# Komi Store

> Free, open-source app store for GitHub releases. Cross-platform (Android, Windows, macOS, Linux). Apache-2.0. Built by Kurikomi with Kotlin Multiplatform + Compose Multiplatform. Discovery, silent install, signing-key verification, and a multi-source mirror system for restricted networks.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://github-store.org/): What Komi Store is, the core features, and how it works.
- [Download](https://github-store.org/download/): Per-platform install methods. Android (APK direct, F-Droid, Obtainium). Windows (EXE, MSI, portable ZIP, Scoop, Winget). macOS (DMG arm64/x64, PKG). Linux (AppImage, DEB, pacman; RPM temporarily paused). SHA-256 signing fingerprint for verification.
- [Features](https://github-store.org/features/): Full feature catalog. Discovery, release browser, mirror system, rich details, app management (Library Imports, Obtainium import/export, Shizuku/Sui/Dhizuku silent install), collections, announcements feed, authentication, tweaks, localization (13 languages), network & performance. Listing requirements.
- [Privacy Policy](https://github-store.org/privacy-policy/): Privacy-first explainer. No personal data collected by default. Optional anonymous analytics opt-in. Newsletter handled by Buttondown, separate from app.

## Blog

- [Blog index](https://github-store.org/blog/): Founder essays, position posts, comparison guides, engineering deep-dives.
- [Blog RSS](https://github-store.org/blog/feed.xml): RSS 2.0 feed of latest posts.

## Project resources

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/kurikomi-labs/komi-store): Source code, releases, issue tracker.
- [GitHub releases](https://github.com/kurikomi-labs/komi-store/releases): Latest installers for every platform.
- [Wiki](https://github.com/kurikomi-labs/komi-store/wiki): How Komi Store discovers apps, installer extension list, listing requirements.
- [Discord](https://discord.github-store.org): Community + maintainer Q&A.

## Optional

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://github-store.org/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable URL list.
- [robots.txt](https://github-store.org/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
